title: Blissful Tofu Poppers
description: A crispy and flavorful snack made with tofu poppers, bliss, and a hint of spice.
instructions: Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (175°C).
Dust the tofu poppers with cornstarch.
In a separate bowl, mix together soy sauce, garlic powder, salt, and pepper.
Marinate the tofu poppers in the soy sauce mixture for at least 10 minutes.
Remove the tofu poppers from the marinade and fry them in batches until golden brown.
Remove the fried tofu poppers from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
In a separate pan, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped bliss and sauté until fragrant.
Add the fried tofu poppers to the pan with the bliss and stir-fry for 1-2 minutes.
Serve the Blissful Tofu Poppers hot and enjoy!
Optional: Garnish with chopped green onions or sesame seeds for added flavor and texture.
